mapper.select:
SELECT count(1) FROM lkt_integral_goods g LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list a ON g.goods_id = a.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch m ON a.mch_id = m.id
g.sort ${sort_sort},

sql.if: and (a.product_title like concat('%',#{product_title},'%') or a.id like concat('%',#{product_title},'%'))

if.test: startTime != '' and startTime != null and endTime != '' and endTime != null

mapper.select: select count(b.id) from lkt_integral_goods as b left join lkt_product_list as a on b.goods_id=a.id left join lkt_product_class class on class.cid = substring_index(substring_index(a.product_class, '-', 2), '-', -1) left join lkt_configure AS c ON a.id = c.pid and b.attr_id = c.id left join lkt_brand_class brand on brand.brand_id=a.brand_id left join lkt_mch mch on mch.id = a.mch_id

select count(b.id) from lkt_integral_goods as b left join lkt_product_list as a on b.goods_id=a.id left join lkt_product_class class on class.cid = substring_index(substring_index(a.product_class, '-', 2), '-', -1) left join lkt_configure AS c ON a.id = c.pid and b.attr_id = c.id right join lkt_order_details as details on details.p_id = b.id right join lkt_order as o on o.sNo = details.r_sNo
and b.id = #{goodsId} and b.store_id = #{storeId} and o.otype = 'IN'
